headline: Teledyne FLIR Defense Launches Black Recon™ Autonomous Micro-Drone
summary: PARIS, June 15, 2026--Teledyne FLIR Defense, part of Teledyne Technologies Incorporated (NYSE: TDY), today announced at Eurosatory the market launch of Black Recon™, an autonomously launched micro-drone system that delivers continuous, untethered reconnaissance from military vehicles and fixed installations.

content.title: Teledyne FLIR Defense Launches Black Recon™ Autonomous Micro-Drone
content.summary: PARIS, June 15, 2026--Teledyne FLIR Defense, part of Teledyne Technologies Incorporated (NYSE: TDY), today announced at Eurosatory the market launch of Black Recon™, an autonomously launched micro-drone system that delivers continuous, untethered reconnaissance from military vehicles and fixed installations.

thumbnail.caption: Teledyne FLIR Defense announced at Eurosatory the market launch of Black Recon™, an autonomously launched micro-drone that delivers continuous, untethered reconnaissance from military vehicles and fixed installations. Black Recon allows crews to launch, operate, recover, and recharge up to three UAS without leaving their platform, reducing operator risk.
